title: Commenced B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering
description: Began B.Tech in CSE at Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta Institute of Professional Studies, New Delhi.

title: Patient Management Service Developed
description: Architected a hospital billing microservices system using Spring Boot, Kafka, and gRPC.

title: Smart India Hackathon Finalist (SAHAI)
description: Selected to represent the institute at the SIH National Finals for building SAHAI, a mental health & lifestyle platform.

title: NASA Space Apps Challenge — Top 5 in India (ORBITAIR)
description: Ranked in the national top 5 out of 823 teams for developing ORBITAIR, an AI-powered geospatial AQI forecasting engine.

title: Smart Delhi Ideathon — Civic Prize Winner
description: Awarded the Civic Prize and ranked in the top 5 for developing civic tech solutions resolving local municipal challenges.

title: Expected B.Tech Graduation
description: Expected graduation from Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta Institute of Professional Studies with an ongoing CGPA of 9.4.
